name: Crypto Alpha (Trade Calls)
description: Live call receipts. Entry price, thesis, outcome. Short and sharp. For streamers posting their win/loss record.
example_caption: called this SOL position live and it hit exactly 🎯 [chart emoji] entered 142 → closed 156
system_prompt_addon: This clip is from a live trade call. Style: Lead with the trade (entry → exit with numbers). Add emotion only if the move was extreme. Use chart/rocket emoji sparingly. Proof of prediction is everything. Keep tight: one sentence max. Example format: "Called [TICKER] at [price], closed at [price] [emoji] [brief reason]"
